general.name: Report-Only Plan - Jamf Protect Configuration
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>8d95fc56-4226-4ab6-9748-1f228c6a69e3</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>com.jamf.protect.8d95fc56-4226-4ab6-9748-1f228c6a69e3</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Report-Only Plan - Jamf Protect Configuration</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Protect Certificates and PPPC Configuration Plans</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>3e116b7c-e5e2-4a37-ab1b-689062c55f43</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.root</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>3e116b7c-e5e2-4a37-ab1b-689062c55f43</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Protect Root CA</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>CA Certificate for Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>rootCA.der</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>3cfbe214-fcea-4406-b5a4-398df6da8f6e</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.pkcs12</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>3cfbe214-fcea-4406-b5a4-398df6da8f6e</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Protect CSR</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>CSR for Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>csr.p12</string><key>Password</key><string>gameplan</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>5790f89f-0500-4912-ad6d-349ed8e4ffd5</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.pkcs12</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>5790f89f-0500-4912-ad6d-349ed8e4ffd5</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Websocket Authentication Certificate</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Certificate for Jamf Protect to be able to communicate over websockets</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>iotCustomAuthPrivateKey.p12</string><key>Password</key><string>gameplan</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>59c15de8-4524-4fcf-b3eb-0bf22dc175db</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.system-extension-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Jamf Protect</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>59c15de8-4524-4fcf-b3eb-0bf22dc175db</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Protect System Extension</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Protect System Extension</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>AllowUserOverrides</key><true/><key>AllowedSystemExtensions</key><dict><key>483DWKW443</key><array><string>com.jamf.protect.security-extension</string></array></dict><key>RemovableSystemExtensions</key><dict><key>483DWKW443</key><array><string>com.jamf.protect.security-extension</string></array></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>d4cd6701-6137-42a0-9654-766ef1df64f8</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.TCC.configuration-profile-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Jamf</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>d4cd6701-6137-42a0-9654-766ef1df64f8</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Protect PPPC</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Protect PPPC</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>Services</key><dict><key>Accessibility</key><array><dict><key>Identifier</key><string>com.jamf.protect.daemon</string><key>CodeRequirement</key><string>anchor apple generic and identifier "com.jamf.protect.daemon" and (certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.9] /* exists */ or certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.13] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = "483DWKW443")</string><key>IdentifierType</key><string>bundleID</string><key>Allowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>Identifier</key><string>com.jamf.protect.security-extension</string><key>CodeRequirement</key><string>anchor configuration</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.jamf.protect</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>bootstrapToken</key><string>eyJhbGciOiJFUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..5j0SSQz6wSoAQffJ1nfV8LeYyPxlSH--fEjsrET6pXpO34xEt2YMxGPTpo0tx2Tdo68rPQQ_UtkpqF7_FPc5ZA</string></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Safelists to install launch
